title: Abundant Delight
description: Adds new dishes that combine two mods: Abundant Atmosphere and Farmer's Delight.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f4f9628145173a6641bc05e72df4f517a0027a_0.webp)
This add-on was created to extend compatibility between Farmer's Delight and Abundant Atmosphere.
There isn't much content in the mod itself, but everything that is there looks unusual and interesting.

I plan to update the mod with the release of new versions of AA.

Content:
**Dishes:**
- Red Bamboo Stir-fry
- Puffball Soup
- Mossy Pancakes and Rust Mossy Pancakes
- Rabbit Sandwich
- Poreshroom on Log
- Stuffed Gourdnut
- Wisp Cheesecake
- Puffball Mushroom Crate
